scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.install-all: cd client && npm install --include=dev && cd ../server && npm install --include=dev
scripts.build-server: cd server && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma db push && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-server && npm run build-client
